turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. sets criteria for interest rate increases - Truth in Lending Act (TILA)
2. outlines how credit information can be collected and shared - Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA)
3. provides steps for getting billing errors corrected - Fair Credit Billing Act (FCBA)
4. prohibits harassment from debt collectors - Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)

 Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act
Kefauver-Harris Amendments
Medical Device Amendments
Nutrition Labeling and Education Act match each act

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. requires proof of claims made on product labels - Nutrition Labeling and Education Act
2. seeks to prevent injuries from faulty medical devices - Medical Device Amendments
3. requires drug manufacturers to produce evidence of a product's effectiveness - Kefauver-Harris Amendments
4. allows inspections of factories producing food products and medicines - Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: match the consumer protection laws to the agencies that implement these laws. 1. fda 2. ftc 3. occ 4. cpsc       Sherman Act. Poison Prevention Packaging Act (PPPA). Nutrition Labeling and Education Act. Truth in Lending Act (TILA). Medical Device Amendments. Clayton Act. Federal Hazardous Substances Act (FHSA)

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. FDA - Medical Device Amendments, Nutrition Labeling and Education Act
2. FTC - Truth in Lending Act (TILA)
3. OCC - None of the above
4. CPSC - Federal Hazardous Substances Act (FHSA), Poison Prevention Packaging Act (PPPA)
